'''旧暦3月30日'''は[[旧暦]][[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]の30日目である。年によっては3月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * （[[585年]]_月_日） - [[仏教]]排斥を唱える[[物部守屋]]が、仏像・寺院等を焼打ち
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * （[[1063年]]_月_日） - [[仁宗]]、[[北宋]]の4代皇帝（* [[1010年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[3月29日 (旧暦)|3月29日]] 翌日[[4月1日 (旧暦)|4月1日]] - 前月[[2月30日 (旧暦)|2月30日]] 翌月[[4月30日 (旧暦)|4月30日]] *新暦[[3月30日]]
{{msg:stub}}

revision.comment: adding info to all the day 30s of the calendar. citation needed see more info
revision.text:
{{Lunar March}} '''March 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.{{citation needed}}<!--taken from https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Chinese_calendar&oldid=1278636661 this is present on day 30 of all months, so add it to every single page here when you find a source for one of them-->
<!-- {{出典の明記|date=2022年12月17日 (土) 10:40 (UTC)}}{{Lunar March}} ''March 30'''<!--Lunar March30 is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の30日目である。年によっては3月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]][[Category:友引]]である。
--> == Events == * [[用明天皇]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[585年]][[5月4日]]） - [[仏教]]排斥を唱える[[物部守屋]]が、[[仏像]]・[[寺院]]等を焼打ち
== Births ==

{{Lunar March}} '''March 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). [[sn:March 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 30일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月三十]] [[zh:三月三十]] [[en:draft:March 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * [[用明天皇]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[585]][[5月4日]]） - [[仏教]]排斥を唱える[[物部守屋]]が、[[仏像]]・[[寺院]]等を焼打ち
== Births ==

[[sn:March 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 30일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月三十]] [[zh:三月三十]] [[en:draft:March 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * [[用明天皇]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[585]][[5月4日]]） - [[仏教]]排斥を唱える[[物部守屋]]が、[[仏像]]・[[寺院]]等を焼打ち
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[嘉祐]]8th year（ユリウス暦[[1063]][[5月1日]]） - [[仁宗 (宋)|仁宗]]、[[北宋]]の4代皇帝（* [[1010]]） * [[嘉永]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1850]][[5月11日]]） - [[徳川斉朝]]、第10代[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1793]]）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * [[用明天皇]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[585]][[5月4日]]） - [[仏教]]排斥を唱える[[物部守屋]]が、[[仏像]]・[[寺院]]等を焼打ち
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[嘉祐]]8th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1063]][[5月1日]]） - [[仁宗 (宋)|仁宗]]、[[北宋]]の4代皇帝（* [[1010]]） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}}3rd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1850]][[5月11日]]） - [[徳川斉朝]]、第10代[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1793]]）

revision.text:
[[sn:March 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 30일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月三十]] [[zh:三月三十]] [[en:draft:March 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * [[用明天皇]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[585]] [[May 4]] ） - [[仏教]] 排斥を唱える[[物部守屋]] が、[[仏像]] ・[[寺院]] 等を焼打ち
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[嘉祐]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1063]] [[May 1]] ） - [[仁宗 (宋)|仁宗]] 、[[北宋]] の4代皇帝（* [[1010]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1850]] [[May 11]] ） - [[徳川斉朝]] 、第10代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1793]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|29|4|1|2|30|4|3|0330}}

[[sn:March 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 30일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月三十]] [[zh:三月三十]] [[en:draft:March 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[嘉祐]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1063]] [[5月1日]] ） - [[仁宗 (宋)|仁宗]] 、[[北宋]] の4代皇帝（* [[1010]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1850]] [[5月11日]] ） - [[徳川斉朝]] 、第10代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1793]] ）

[[sn:March 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 30일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月三十]] [[zh:三月三十]] [[en:draft:March 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[嘉祐]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1063]] [[May 1]] ） - [[仁宗 (宋)|仁宗]] 、[[北宋]] の4代皇帝（* [[1010]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1850]] [[May 11]] ） - [[徳川斉朝]] 、第10代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1793]] ）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .

There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * [[用明天皇]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[585]] [[May 4]] ） - [[仏教]] 排斥を唱える[[物部守屋]] が、[[仏像]] ・[[寺院]] 等を焼打ち
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[嘉祐]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1063]] [[May 1]] ） - [[仁宗 (宋)|仁宗]] 、[[北宋]] の4代皇帝（* [[1010]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1850]] [[May 11]] ） - [[徳川斉朝]] 、第10代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1793]] ）

[[sn:March 30 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 30일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月三十]] [[zh:三月三十]] [[en:draft:March 30 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250qq1081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * [[用明天皇]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[585]] [[May 4]] ） - [[仏教]] 排斥を唱える[[物部守屋]] が、[[仏像]] ・[[寺院]] 等を焼打ち
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[嘉祐]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1063]] [[May 1]] ） - [[仁宗 (宋)|仁宗]] 、[[北宋]] の4代皇帝（* [[1010]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1850]] [[May qq]] ） - [[徳川斉朝]] 、第10代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1793]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|29|4|1|2|30|4|3|0330}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

[[sn:March 30 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 30일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月三十]] [[zh:三月三十]] [[en:draft:March 30 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * [[用明天皇]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[585]] [[May 4]] ） - [[仏教]] 排斥を唱える[[物部守屋]] が、[[仏像]] ・[[寺院]] 等を焼打ち
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[嘉祐]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1063]] [[May 1]] ） - [[仁宗 (宋)|仁宗]] 、[[北宋]] の4代皇帝（* [[1010]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1850]] [[May 11]] ） - [[徳川斉朝]] 、第10代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1793]] ）

[[sn:March 30 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 30일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月三十]] [[zh:三月三十]] [[en:draft:March 30 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[嘉祐]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1063]] [[May 1]] ） - [[仁宗 (宋)|仁宗]] 、[[Song dynasty]] の4代Emperor（* [[1010]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1850]] [[May 11]] ） - [[徳川斉朝]] 、第10代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1793]] ）

There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

[[sn:March 30 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 30일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月三十]] [[zh:三月三十]] [[en:draft:March 30 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * [[Emperor Yōmei]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[585]] [[May 4]] ） - [[仏教]] 排斥を唱える[[物部守屋]] が、[[仏像]] ・[[寺院]] 等を焼打ち
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[嘉祐]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1063]] [[May 1]] ） - [[仁宗 (宋)|仁宗]] 、[[Song dynasty]] の4代Emperor（* [[1010]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1850]] [[May 11]] ） - [[徳川斉朝]] 、第10代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1793]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|29|4|1|2|30|4|3|0330}}

revision.text:
[[sn:March 30 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 30일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月三十]] [[zh:三月三十]] [[en:draft:March 30 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * [[Emperor Yōmei]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[585]] [[May 4]] ） - [[仏教]] 排斥を唱える[[物部守屋]] が、[[仏像]] ・[[寺院]] 等を焼打ち
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[嘉祐]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1063]] [[May 1]] ） - [[仁宗 (宋)|仁宗]] 、[[Song dynasty]] の4代Emperor（* [[1010]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1850]] [[May 11]] ） - [[徳川斉朝]] 、第10代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1793]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|29|4|1|2|30|4|3|0330}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[嘉祐]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1063]] [[May 1]] ） - [[仁宗 (宋)|仁宗]] 、[[Song dynasty]] の4代Emperor（* [[1010]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1850]] [[May 11]] ） - [[徳川斉朝]] 、第10代[[尾張藩]] 主（* [[1793]] ）

== Births == <!-- No births are listed -->
== Deaths == * [[Kayū|嘉祐]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1063]] {{ill|May 1|ja|5月1日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Renzong of Song|ja|仁宗}}, the 4th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[1010]]).

== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|ja|孝徳天皇|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[585]] {{ill|May 4|ja|5月4日|12=draft}}) – A Buddhist proponent, {{ill|Mononobe no Moriya|ja|物部守屋|12=draft}}, who opposed Buddhism, set fire to Buddhist images and temples.
== Births == <!-- No births are listed -->
== Deaths == * [[Kayū|嘉祐]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1063]] {{ill|May 1|ja|5月1日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Renzong of Song|ja|仁宗|12=draft}}, the 4th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[1010]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|29|4|1|2|30|4|3|0330}}

{{出典の明記|date=2022年12月17日 (土) 10:40 (UTC)}}{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月30日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の30日目である。年によっては3月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[用明天皇]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[585年]][[5月4日]]） - [[仏教]]排斥を唱える[[物部守屋]]が、[[仏像]]・[[寺院]]等を焼打ち
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[嘉祐]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1063年]][[5月1日]]） - [[仁宗 (宋)|仁宗]]、[[北宋]]の4代皇帝（* [[1010年]]） * [[嘉永]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1850年]][[5月11日]]） - [[徳川斉朝]]、第10代[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1793年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|29|4|1|2|30|4|3|0330}}

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|March 30|qq=March 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Yōmei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585|585]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – A Buddhist proponent, [[:en:Mononobe no Moriya|Mononobe no Moriya]], who opposed Buddhism, set fire to Buddhist images and temples. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[Kayū|嘉祐]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1063|1063]] [[:en:May 1|May 1]]) – [[:en:Nhân Tông|Emperor Renzong of Song]], the 4th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:1010|1010]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|29|4|1|2|30|4|3|0330|qq=}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Yōmei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585|585]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – A Buddhist proponent, [[:en:Mononobe no Moriya|Mononobe no Moriya]], who opposed Buddhism, set fire to Buddhist images and temples. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[Kayū|嘉祐]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1063|1063]] [[:en:May 1|May 1]]) – [[:en:Nhân Tông|Emperor Renzong of Song]], the 4th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:1010|1010]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|29|4|1|2|30|4|3|0330|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.

There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Yōmei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585|585]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – A Buddhist proponent, [[:en:Mononobe no Moriya|Mononobe no Moriya]], who opposed Buddhism, set fire to Buddhist images and temples. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[Kayū|嘉祐]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1063|1063]] [[:en:May 1|May 1]]) – [[:en:Nhân Tông|Emperor Renzong of Song]], the 4th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:1010|1010]]).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Yōmei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585|585]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – A Buddhist proponent, [[:en:Mononobe no Moriya|Mononobe no Moriya]], who opposed Buddhism, set fire to Buddhist images and temples. == Births ==

As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Yōmei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585|585]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – A Buddhist proponent, [[:en:Mononobe no Moriya|Mononobe no Moriya]], who opposed Buddhism, set fire to Buddhist images and temples. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[Kayū|嘉祐]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1063|1063]] [[:en:May 1|May 1]]) – [[:en:Nhân Tông|Emperor Renzong of Song]], the 4th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:1010|1010]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|29|4|1|2|30|4|3|0330|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月三十]][[zh:三月三十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839125]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 30|qq=March 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Yōmei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585|585]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – A Buddhist proponent, [[:en:Mononobe no Moriya|Mononobe no Moriya]], who opposed Buddhism, set fire to Buddhist images and temples. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[Kayū|嘉祐]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1063|1063]] [[:en:May 1|May 1]]) – [[:en:Nhân Tông|Emperor Renzong of Song]], the 4th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:1010|1010]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|29|4|1|2|30|4|3|0330|qq=}}

There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Yōmei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585|585]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – A Buddhist proponent, [[:en:Mononobe no Moriya|Mononobe no Moriya]], who opposed Buddhism, set fire to Buddhist images and temples. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[Kayū|嘉祐]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1063|1063]] [[:en:May 1|May 1]]) – [[:en:Nhân Tông|Emperor Renzong of Song]], the 4th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:1010|1010]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|29|4|1|2|30|4|3|0330|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 30일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月三十]][[zh:三月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 30일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月三十]][[zh:三月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月三十]][[zh:三月三十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839125]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 30|qq=March 30}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Kōtoku|Emperor Yōmei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585|585]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – A Buddhist proponent, [[:en:Mononobe no Moriya|Mononobe no Moriya]], who opposed Buddhism, set fire to Buddhist images and temples. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[Kayū|嘉祐]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1063|1063]] [[:en:May 1|May 1]]) – [[:en:Nhân Tông|Emperor Renzong of Song]], the 4th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:1010|1010]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|29|4|1|2|30|4|3|0330|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|en|Emperor Kōtoku|WD=Q317980|lt=Emperor Yōmei}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|585|en|585|WD=Q32201|lt=585}} {{ill|May 4|en|May 4|WD=Q2549|lt=May 4}}) – A Buddhist proponent, {{ill|Mononobe no Moriya|en|Mononobe no Moriya|WD=Q2424736|lt=Mononobe no Moriya}}, who opposed Buddhism, set fire to Buddhist images and temples. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[Kayū|嘉祐]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1063|en|1063|WD=Q19400|lt=1063}} {{ill|May 1|en|May 1|WD=Q2544|lt=May 1}}) – {{ill|Nhân Tông|en|Nhân Tông|WD=Q20943819|lt=Emperor Renzong of Song}}, the 4th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born {{ill|1010|en|1010|WD=Q19237|lt=1010}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|29|4|1|2|30|4|3|0330|qq=}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|en|Emperor Kōtoku|WD=Q317980|lt=Emperor Yōmei}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|585|en|585|WD=Q32201|lt=585}} {{ill|May 4|en|May 4|WD=Q2549|lt=May 4}}) – A Buddhist proponent, {{ill|Mononobe no Moriya|en|Mononobe no Moriya|WD=Q2424736|lt=Mononobe no Moriya}}, who opposed Buddhism, set fire to Buddhist images and temples. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[Kayū|嘉祐]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1063|en|1063|WD=Q19400|lt=1063}} {{ill|May 1|en|May 1|WD=Q2544|lt=May 1}}) – {{ill|Nhân Tông|en|Nhân Tông|WD=Q20943819|lt=Emperor Renzong of Song}}, the 4th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born {{ill|1010|en|1010|WD=Q19237|lt=1010}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|29|4|1|2|30|4|3|0330|qq=}}

== Deaths == * [[Kayū|嘉祐]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1063|en|1063|WD=Q19400|lt=1063|1=1063}} {{ill|May 1|en|May 1|WD=Q2544|lt=May 1|1=May 1}}) – {{ill|Nhân Tông|en|Nhân Tông|WD=Q20943819|lt=Emperor Renzong of Song|1=Nhân Tông}}, the 4th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born {{ill|1010|en|1010|WD=Q19237|lt=1010|1=1010}}).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月三十]][[zh:三月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月三十]][[zh:三月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月三十]][[zh:三月三十]]
{{Not to be confused with|March 30|qq=March 30}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

== Deaths == * [[Kayū|嘉祐]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1063|en|1063|qid=Q19400|lt=1063|1=1063}} {{ill|May 1|en|May 1|qid=Q2544|lt=May 1|1=May 1}}) – {{ill|Nhân Tông|en|Nhân Tông|qid=Q20943819|lt=Emperor Renzong of Song|1=Nhân Tông}}, the 4th Emperor of the Song dynasty (born {{ill|1010|en|1010|qid=Q19237|lt=1010|1=1010}}).
